details.IncidentDetail: "[5] DEER IS ON THE SOUTH SHOULDER "

"[22] OWNER WILL CALL OFFICER TAYLOR WHEN THEYRE GETTING CLOSE "
"[21] 37-605 CPYS HAVE THEM CALL ME WHEN HE IS GETTING CLOSE SO IM NOT SITTING ON THE SIDE OF THE RD FOR HOURS "

"[20] 37-605 IF YOURE HAVING TROUBLE FINDING A TOW OO REDDING IF YOU COULD CONTACT THE TOW HERE IN BURNEY AND SEE WHEN THEYD BE AVAILABLE I PUT SOME CONES OUT HERE AT THE VEHICLE AND CAB BE BACK ENRT WHEN THEYRE READY "
